prompt: The same listener asked for a hypothetical 'SBS combine': what tests should a generally strong/fit/athletic person repeat every ~12 weeks to track progress?
assertions: Proposes covering multiple fitness capacities, not just barbell strength
Includes an aerobic capacity test (e.g., 2-mile run, 5K, or similar distance event)
Includes an anaerobic/short running test (e.g., 400m, 800m, or sprint)
Includes an explosive power test (e.g., vertical jump, broad jump, or medicine ball throw)
Includes a barbell strength test (e.g., squat/bench/deadlift RM test)
Suggests this full battery may be better as a less frequent check (e.g., annual) rather than every 12 weeks
